channel.title: Blog on Yakkl
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Yakkl

item.title: Beta version of Yakkl
item.description: Today, we announce the first beta of the open-sourced version of Yakkl which can be found at Yakkl Github Repo. This beta release will give you a glimpse into what is coming and it includes not only channels but topics so you do not have to put up with “Channel Sprawl”. Geek Speak The coming beta release will also remove some of the older Puppet deployment options and bash scripts.

item.title: Join our Slack community
item.description: I know, right? Why do we have a Slack channel? Simple, Slack is a good tool but for large diverse teams it gets a little challenging to administer not to mention “Channel Sprawl”. We have a Slack channel in the unlikely event Yakkl is having an issue and you may want to instant message us. Again, not likely. Want to chat with the Yakkl community about best-practices, features, and more? Join the slack community here (we’ll get back to you ASAP).
